summary: Tillis search interest spiking due to retirement announcement, Trump feud, Fed nominee opposition. Currently declining from Jan 28-29 peak. Feb 3 value = 11, post-first-spike baseline was ~12. New news likely given active Senate session.
content:
Key findings:
1. Pre-news baseline (Dec): 0-6
2. First spike Jan 12 (100) - settled to ~12 by Jan 16-24
3. Second massive spike Jan 28-29 (84, 91) due to: retirement announcement, Trump "loser" label, opposition to Fed nominee Warsh, criticism of Noem/Miller
4. Decay: 91→63→42→25→15→11 (Feb 3)
5. Current value (11) is near the post-first-spike baseline (~12)
6. Tillis is actively making news - ongoing confrontations with Trump admin, opposing nominees, retirement announced
7. Senate is in session - more votes/confrontations possible
8. Rate of decay slowing as it approaches baseline
